title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Endovascular devices - Part 1: Endovascular prostheses
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 血管内器械 - 第1部分：血管内假体

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for endovascular prostheses (stent-grafts) for aortic and peripheral vascular repair. Confirmed 2023.
standards.scope: Endovascular stent-grafts for aortic aneurysm and peripheral vascular disease.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Endovascular devices - Part 3: Vena cava filters
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 血管内器械 - 第3部分：腔静脉滤器

standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for vena cava filters used to prevent pulmonary embolism. Covers design, materials, preclinical and clinical evaluation.
standards.scope: Vena cava filters for pulmonary embolism prevention.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants and extracorporeal systems - Vascular prostheses - Tubular vascular grafts and vascular patches
title.zh: 心血管植入物和体外循环系统 - 血管假体 - 管状血管移植物和血管补片

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for tubular vascular grafts and vascular patches, both synthetic and of biological origin. Confirmed 2022.
standards.scope: Tubular vascular grafts and patches (synthetic and biological).

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Endovascular devices - Part 4: Coils and flow diverters
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 血管内器械 - 第4部分：弹簧圈和血流导向装置

standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for neurovascular coils and flow diverters used for treatment of intracranial aneurysms.
standards.scope: Neurovascular coils and flow diverters for intracranial aneurysm treatment.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants and extracorporeal systems - Vascular device-drug combination products - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 心血管植入物和体外循环系统 - 血管器械-药物组合产品 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for vascular device-drug combination products (e.g. drug-eluting stents). Covers drug release, biocompatibility, and performance. Confirmed 2021.
standards.scope: Drug-eluting vascular devices (drug-eluting stents, drug-coated balloons).
